zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Aldeburgh於大約1363年出生在英國越可爾希亞活 卡素時，她的父親Sir William Aldebrough28歲，母親Elizabeth de Lisle25歲。她於大約1380年與Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1417年12月21日在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德列文斯享年55歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希亞活哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Aldeburgh于大约1363年出生在英国越可爾希亞活 卡素时，她的父亲Sir William Aldebrough28岁，母亲Elizabeth de Lisle25岁。她于大约1380年与Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1417年12月21日在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德列文斯享年55岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希亞活哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Aldeburgh was born about 1363, in Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir William Aldebrough, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth de Lisle, was 25. She married Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II about 1380. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 21 December 1417, in Levens, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Aldeburgh est née environ 1363, à Harewood Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Aldebrough, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Lisle, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II environ 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 21 décembre 1417, à Levens, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints Church, Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Aldeburgh um 1363 in Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Aldebrough 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Lisle 25. Sie hat um 1380 Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 21. Dezember 1417 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Levens, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II circa 1380. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Aldeburghが約1363年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッド カストルで生まれた時，父Sir William Aldebroughは28歳，母Elizabeth de Lisleは25歳であった。約1380年にSir Brian Stapleton of Carlton IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1417年12月21日にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドレベンスで55歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドアル サインツ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire,: 영국 요르크실르 하레우드 앨 세인츠 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Aldeburgh(이)가 대략 1363년 영국 요르크실르 하레우드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Aldebrough(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Lisle(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 12월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 레븐스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 하레우드 앨 세인츠 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Aldeburgh nasceu aproximadamente 1363, em Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Aldebrough, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Lisle, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II aproximadamente 1380. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1417, em Levens, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire,: алл сеинц чурч, харюуд, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Aldeburgh родилась около 1363 г. в местности харюуд кастл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Aldebrough было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Lisle, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II около 1380 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 21 декабря 1417 г. в местности ливенс, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц чурч, харюуд, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II aproximadamente 1380. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1417, en Levens, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
